versions.version_description: Mine is at least 99% correct, the others have been rated 5 stars and it's not accurate in the choruses especially.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
| [ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] |
[tab]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
Hey hey, bye bye bye. Bye bye, bye bye.[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm doing this tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You're probably gonna start a fight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
I know this can't be right, hey baby come on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I loved you endlessly[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
And you weren't there for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
So now it's time to leave and make it alone[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I know that I can't take no more, it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna see you out that door[/tab]

Baby bye, bye, bye


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Just hit me with the truth[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Now, girl you're more than welcome to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
So give me one good reason baby come on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I live for you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
And now I really come to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
That life would be much better once you're gone[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I know that I can't take no more, it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna see you out that door[/tab]

Baby bye, bye, bye


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm giving up, I know for sure[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't want to be the reason for your love no more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm checking out, I'm signing off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't want to be the loser and I've had enough[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna be your fool[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
In this game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
So I'm leaving you behind[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
But I've had enough, And it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
ain't no lie[/tab]

Bye Bye


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]  
Baby, bye, bye, bye[/tab]
